第一個諗都唔諗即刻磅水既kickstarter project
仲有17日個project就完，
到時都籌唔夠錢就成唔到事架啦
世界上只有我地係香港人，
攞少少錢出黎捍衛自己語言唔係咁都做唔到啩

開工時間先推啦

自己諗住捐25 雖然唔係好多 但都盡少少力
同埋佢好似需要一啲識講廣東話既人係讀音上面幫幫手 小弟都諗住略盡綿力 畢竟自己係香港長大 又識講廣東話 冇理由唔去做啲野

Wenlin Institute, Inc. SPC says:

Thank you for all standing by for the exiting news.

Wenlin has just signed a contract with Pleco to add the ABC Cantonese Dictionary to their dictionary line.

We've updated *some* of the pledge categories to include a free offline copy of the Pleco version to be released mid 2017.

If you'd like, you can adjust your pledge to the new tiers that include Pleco. Why not? It's a gift!

Spread the news and let us know if you have questions!
Pish

Wenlin Institute, Inc. SPC says:

Thank you for all standing by for the exiting news.

Wenlin has just signed a contract with Pleco to add the ABC Cantonese Dictionary to their dictionary line.

We've updated *some* of the pledge categories to include a free offline copy of the Pleco version to be released mid 2017.

If you'd like, you can adjust your pledge to the new tiers that include Pleco. Why not? It's a gift!

Spread the news and let us know if you have questions!

Wenlin Institute, Inc. SPC says:

I just got the best email from Keith L. He suggested I re-record the video in Cantonese. I think this is an excellent idea!

Except, I don't speak Cantonese!

BUT if you do speak native Cantonese, and want to send us a short video about why you are supporting this Kickstarter Campaign, we'd LOVE to share it. Just send it to me at elisabeth@wenlin.com.

All my gratitude to all of you!

Elisabeth

問下其他人的意思同寫埋地點係邊度揾到…

而唔係美國學者…
